purpose: Current-phase task checklist generated from the agent-maintained source coverage matrix and platform capability check. Use it before editing and update the matrix/check after work.
instructions: Start with implementationGroups as the current phase implementation contract: implement each group, then use mustComplete entries as exact row-level checks.

Use planContract as upstream planning ownership evidence; resolve its alignmentFindings by updating plannedPhase/matrix/platform evidence or by documenting sourceOverride/analysisGap when source inspection disagrees.
Keep grouped business behavior discoverable through precise target endpoints; avoid closing unrelated features only through root/shell/whole-file endpoints.
Merge source files only when it improves target clarity and still preserves per-feature evidence, tests, and controllable file size.
Treat mustComplete entries as the current phase's executable row-level task list.
Use behaviorAudit as the current phase behavior audit; it checks closed critical/high rows for source behavior, target behavior, parity, and verification evidence.

Use uiContract entries as static-analysis planning aids, not complete UI specifications: preserve listed source-visible screen structure, route/back behavior, actions, state feedback, and visual evidence needs, then re-read source/resources/navigation for UI behavior the static analysis may have missed.
Do not close the phase while current-phase critical/high entries are open, weakly deferred, or missing evidence.
For every closed critical/high source feature, record sourceBehavior, targetBehavior, parityLevel, targetEndpoints, and verificationEvidence in source-coverage-matrix.json.
A build pass alone is not per-feature verification; cite tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence for behavior closure.
Use implemented-simplified only with concrete simplification reason, preserved-behavior explanation, target endpoints or tests, and source/platform evidence.

If a suitable HarmonyOS/Cangjie API, Kit, example, or package exists for a platform capability, use it or record a platform replacement; do not close the item with local mock data, sample data, in-memory simulation, or another fallback.
Use deferred only for concrete blockers; otherwise implement faithfully or platform-replace with evidence.
Update source-coverage-matrix.json/md and platform-capability-check.json/md before phase completion.
If this checklist is empty but the phase has real scope in plan.md/plan.json, assign plannedPhase values first.

planContractRefs.title: Login and logout session flows
uiContracts: invalid login shows snackbar
valid login routes to home and clears back stack
logout routes to onboarding and clears back stack
dataContracts: login flag toggles through the persisted session service

planRiskHints: Do not replace snackbar feedback with silent failure.
Do not infer real authentication or network behavior that does not exist in source.
planAcceptanceEvidence: Target tests verify successful and unsuccessful login outcomes.
planRequiredBehaviors: Credential entry updates local field state immediately.
Incorrect credentials keep the user on the login page with an error message.
Login and logout both mutate the persisted login state service.

planContractRefs.title: Onboarding pager and progress flow
uiContracts: three onboarding pages
progress indicators
next action advances page or routes to login

planRiskHints: Accompanist pager is source-specific; do not copy its API shape into the target.
planAcceptanceEvidence: Page indicators and next button behavior match source progression semantics.
planRequiredBehaviors: Pager state is preserved within the onboarding session.
Final step transitions to login only after the last page.

uiContracts: invalid login shows snackbar

logout routes to onboarding and clears back stack

planRiskHints: Do not replace snackbar feedback with silent failure.

planAcceptanceEvidence: Target tests verify successful and unsuccessful login outcomes.

implementationGroups.title: Verification and evidence policy
requiredBehaviors: Verify the phase's implemented behavior with focused tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence.
riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.

notes: The latest test build report is accepted as PASS evidence for matching referenced tests.

behaviorAudit.purpose: Current-phase behavior audit derived from source-coverage-matrix.json, platform-capability-check.json, and verification-results.json. It is embedded in phase-task-checklist.json for auditability; update the matrix and platform check, then rerun coverage to refresh this view.
instructions: For each closed critical/high feature, keep sourceBehavior, targetBehavior, targetEndpoints, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence specific to the feature.
Do not use this generated section as the source of truth. Update source-coverage-matrix.json/md and platform-capability-check.json/md.
A build pass alone is not per-feature verification; cite tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence for behavior closure.

unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.sourceEvidenceSummary: Detected 88 source artifact(s) with terms: file_ops, intent_uri, permissions, saf, storage
requiredTargetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie file picker document access
HarmonyOS Cangjie file share URI permissions
targetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie file picker document SAF URI permissions
unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.minimumParity: Copy, move, rename, delete, create folder, collision handling, permission-denied feedback, and stable paths for target UI.
unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.notes: Source walkthrough found no file picker, document open/import/export flow, content/file URI sharing, or filesystem read/write behavior. The app only uses bundled resources and in-memory/static data.

unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.sourceEvidenceSummary: Detected 26 source artifact(s) with terms: image_viewer, zoom, bitmap, exif
requiredTargetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie image component gestures zoom pan
HarmonyOS ArkUI pinch gesture Cangjie image
unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.minimumParity: Display current image, previous/next navigation, toolbar visibility, zoom/reset, pan or button fallback, and metadata/details access.
unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.notes: Source app displays bundled images in cards, ads, onboarding pages, and profile art only. No zoom, pan, gallery preview, EXIF, bitmap editing, or dedicated viewer gesture behavior exists in inspected source files.

unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.sourceEvidenceSummary: Detected 26 source artifact(s) with terms: file_ops, mediastore, gallery

HarmonyOS media assets photo album Cangjie API

unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.minimumParity: Discover albums/media, filter image/video/GIF, sort, expose metadata needed by viewer/list screens, and report permission or empty-library states.
unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.notes: Source walkthrough found only packaged drawable and mipmap assets rendered by Compose Image composables. No PhotoAccessHelper, MediaStore, gallery query, album discovery, picker, or external media metadata flow exists in the source app.

unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.capabilityName: Background work, services, receivers, widgets, and notifications

unassignedCriticalHighPlatformSamples.notes: Source app has only standard Application and launcher Activity startup wiring with splash/theme setup. It does not define background work, services, receivers, providers, widgets, notifications, or home-screen integration. Startup lifecycle is tracked separately in an added reviewed capability row.
